# Kadak Kadaknath Eggs

> Premium farm-fresh Kadaknath (Kali Masi) black chicken eggs — delivered across Bengaluru, India.

Kadak Kadaknath Eggs is a FSSAI-licensed food business based in Electronic City, Bengaluru, Karnataka, India. We specialize in selling and delivering premium Kadaknath eggs — a superfood from the rare native Indian Kadaknath chicken breed.

## What is Kadaknath?

The Kadaknath (also called "Kali Masi") is one of three black-meat chicken breeds in the world, native to the Jhabua and Dhar districts of Madhya Pradesh, India. The breed has a unique genetic condition called fibromelanosis, which causes high melanin deposition throughout the body — resulting in black feathers, black meat, dark organs, and dark-tinted eggs. Everything about this chicken is naturally black and completely safe to consume.

Kadaknath eggs and meat have been recognized in Ayurvedic and modern nutrition as a powerful superfood due to their extraordinary nutritional profile.

## Why Kadaknath Eggs Are Superior

Compared to regular white or brown chicken eggs:

- **Protein**: ~25% more protein than regular eggs (7.2g per egg vs ~5.5g)
- **Cholesterol**: Extremely low — only 0.73–1.05% (vs 13–25% in regular eggs)
- **Fat**: Lower fat content overall
- **Iron**: Significantly richer in iron — helps prevent anemia and boosts hemoglobin
- **Vitamins**: Rich in Vitamin B1, B2, B6, B12
- **Amino Acids**: Contains all essential amino acids
- **Antioxidants**: High antioxidant content strengthens immunity

## Best Suited For

- Fitness enthusiasts and bodybuilders (high protein, muscle recovery)
- Heart patients (very low cholesterol)
- People with anemia or iron deficiency
- Pregnant women and growing children (iron + vitamins)
- Diabetics (low fat, low cholesterol)
- Senior citizens (high protein, easy to digest)
- Anyone seeking a healthier alternative to regular eggs

- JP Nagar
- BTM Layout

- HSR Layout

- Whitefield
- And expanding across Bengaluru

Eggs are collected daily and delivered within 12–24 hours of farm collection.

## Nutritional Comparison: Kadaknath vs Regular Eggs

| Feature | Kadaknath Eggs | Regular Eggs |
|---------|----------------|--------------|
| Protein | ~25% more | Standard |
| Cholesterol | 0.73–1.05% | 13–25% |
| Iron | Rich | Low |
| Fat | Low | Higher |
| Vitamins | B1, B2, B6, B12 rich | Moderate |
| Taste | Rich & creamy | Standard |
| Color | Dark shell | White/brown |

## Frequently Asked Questions

**What makes Kadaknath eggs different from regular eggs?**
Kadaknath eggs have 25% more protein, dramatically lower cholesterol (0.73–1.05% vs 13–25%), higher iron, and a richer nutritional profile overall. The dark shell color is a natural result of the breed's fibromelanosis trait.

**Are Kadaknath eggs safe to eat?**
Yes, completely safe. They are FSSAI certified and regularly quality-checked. The black color is natural melanin — not a dye or chemical.

**How quickly are eggs delivered after ordering?**
Within 12–48 hours of farm collection. All eggs are collected fresh daily.

**Can I get a subscription?**
Yes. We offer weekly and bi-monthly subscription plans with free delivery and significant per-egg savings (from ₹20–₹22/egg vs ₹25 for single orders).

**Do you deliver outside Bengaluru?**
Currently serving Bengaluru. Contact us on WhatsApp to inquire about delivery to other locations.

**How do I order?**
Order via WhatsApp at +91-8123232781 (fastest) or through the contact form at https://www.kadakeggs.in/
